title: Address by secondary alias ('Codex') — the harness nickname, not the display name
predicted_basis: multi-identity addressing pool: operators address one bot by whichever of its names is salient (here the harness it runs on); 'Codex' is declared in agent.aliases
failure_mode: a request addressed to a secondary identity reads as aimed at some other participant and PASSes, so the agent never answers a question about its own in-flight work
invariant: a message naming ANY identity in the agent's bundle (id, mention_id, aliases) is addressed to this agent
rationale: The operator asks 'Codex' for status on work this agent itself announced in context. With the secondary handle declared as an alias, this is a direct status question at this agent.
